Who We Are

Your Trusted Pest
Management Partner

Delivering proactive and effective solutions through Integrated Pest Management, disinfection, and pest-proofing services. We help businesses maintain safe, clean, and pest-free environments.


Building on Pharmcle's legacy of excellence, Zaps Solutions Inc. was established in 2023 to deliver reliable, consistent, and effective pest control management services in the Philippines.

Backed by Pharmcle Korea

Proven systems, high-quality products across residential, commercial, and industrial environments.

PCAP Certified

Proud member of the Pest Control Association of the Philippines.

Our Method

The IPTMF Process

Delivers tailored, EFFECTIVE PEST MANAGEMENT through continuous identification, planning, treatment, monitoring, and improvement.

IdentifyThorough site inspection and pest analysis
02
PlanCustom treatment strategy development
03
TreatSafe and effective treatment application
04
